'''zawungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oenomancy|oenomancy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-w-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oenomancy|oenomancy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zawungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæwingith|zæwingith]] || [[word:zæwingij|zæwingij]] || [[word:zæwingish|zæwingish]] || [[word:zæwingi|zæwingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zawuwunguth|zawuwunguth]] || [[word:zawuwunguj|zawuwunguj]] || [[word:zawuwungush|zawuwungush]] || [[word:zawuwungu|zawuwungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zawunguth|zawunguth]] || [[word:zawunguj|zawunguj]] || [[word:zawungush|zawungush]] || [[word:zawungu|zawungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zawufnguth|zawufnguth]] || [[word:zawufnguj|zawufnguj]] || [[word:zawufngush|zawufngush]] || [[word:zawufnguf|zawufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zawunguthu|zawunguthu]] || [[word:zawunguju|zawunguju]] || [[word:zawungushu|zawungushu]] || [[word:zawunguku|zawunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zawunguth|zawunguth]] || [[word:zawunguj|zawunguj]] || [[word:zawungush|zawungush]] || [[word:zawungu|zawungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zawunguthul|zawunguthul]] || [[word:zawungujul|zawungujul]] || [[word:zawungushul|zawungushul]] || [[word:zawungukul|zawungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zawunguthuthu|zawunguthuthu]] || [[word:zawungujuju|zawungujuju]] || [[word:zawungushushu|zawungushushu]] || [[word:zawunguku|zawunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zawunguthun|zawunguthun]] || [[word:zawungujun|zawungujun]] || [[word:zawungushun|zawungushun]] || [[word:zawungukun|zawungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zawunguthuoro|zawunguthuoro]] || [[word:zawungujuoro|zawungujuoro]] || [[word:zawungushuoro|zawungushuoro]] || [[word:zawungukuoro|zawungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
